name: Obliterate
description: Critical hits increase total weapon damage by 1% for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 25 times.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Obliterate
perfectVersion.description: Critical hits increase total weapon damage by 1% for 10 seconds. Stacks up to 24 times.

name: Glass Cannon
description: All damage you deal is amplified by 25%. All damage you take is amplified by 50%.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Glass Cannon
perfectVersion.description: All damage you deal is amplified by 30%. All damage you take is amplified by 60%.
perfectVersion.foundOn: Petrov Defense Group named chest items

name: Intimidate
description: While you have bonus armor, amplifies total weapon damage by 35% to enemies within 10 meters.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Intimidate
perfectVersion.description: While you have bonus armor, amplifies total weapon damage by 40% to enemies within 10 meters.

name: Spotter
description: Amplifies total weapon and skill damage by 15% to pulsed enemies.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Spotter
perfectVersion.description: Amplifies total weapon and skill damage by 20% to pulsed enemies.

name: Unbreakable
description: When your armor is depleted, repair 95% of your armor. Cooldown: 60 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Unbreakable
perfectVersion.description: When your armor is depleted, repair 100% of your armor. Cooldown: 55 seconds.

name: Overwatch
description: After staying in cover for 10 seconds, you and your allies within 30 meters gain 12% bonus weapon and skill damage as long as you remain in cover or perform cover-to-cover movements.

name: Kinetic Momentum
description: While in combat, each skill active or not on cooldown generates stacks. Each stack increases skill damage by 1% and skill repair by 2% up to 15 stacks per skill. Stacks are lost when the skill goes on cooldown.

name: Headhunter
description: After killing an enemy with a headshot, your next weapon hit within 45 seconds deals an additional 125% of that killing blow's damage, capped at 800% weapon damage. This cap is raised to 1250% if your headshot damage is greater than 150%.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Headhunter
perfectVersion.description: After killing an enemy with a headshot, your next weapon hit within 45 seconds deals an additional 125% of that killing blow's damage, capped at 1250% weapon damage (always, regardless of headshot damage stat).

name: Vanguard
description: Deploying your shield grants 45% bonus armor to you and all allies within 20 meters for 20 seconds. Cooldown: 25 seconds.

name: Braced
description: While in cover, weapon handling is increased by 45%.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Braced
perfectVersion.description: While in cover, weapon handling is increased by 50%.

name: Efficient
description: Using an armor kit has a 50% chance to not consume the armor kit. Specialization armor kit bonuses are increased by 100%.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Efficient
perfectVersion.description: Using an armor kit has a 75% chance to not consume the armor kit. Specialization armor kit bonuses are increased by 100%.

name: Empathic Resolve
description: Repairing an ally grants them a damage bonus. The bonus scales from 3% at skill tier 0 to 15% at skill tier 6.

name: Entrench
description: Headshots from cover repair 20% of your armor. Cooldown: 20 seconds.

name: Explosive Delivery
description: When you deploy a skill it lands with a bang, dealing explosive damage in an area. Damage scales with skill tier from 25% to 100% of the skill's damage.

name: Focus
description: While aiming, gain +5% weapon damage every second, up to a maximum of +45%. Buff is lost when you stop aiming.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Focus
perfectVersion.description: While aiming, gain +6% weapon damage every second, up to a maximum of +54%.

name: Gunslinger
description: Swapping weapons grants +20% weapon damage for 5 seconds. The buff is removed if you swap again.

name: Mad Bomber
description: Grenades have +2m radius and can be cooked. Lethal grenades refund the grenade on a kill.

name: Reassigned
description: Killing an enemy adds special ammo to your sidearm: armor-piercing, incendiary, or hollow point. Cooldown: 15 seconds.

name: Skilled
description: Skill kills have a 25% chance to reset skill cooldowns. If the skill is already active, this refreshes its duration instead.

name: Spark
description: Dealing skill damage to an enemy increases total weapon damage by 15% for 15 seconds.

name: Tag Team
description: Hitting an enemy with a skill marks them for 5 seconds. Shooting a marked enemy with a weapon reduces the skill's remaining cooldown by 6 seconds.

name: Tamper Proof
description: Enemies who approach within 4 meters of your deployed skills are shocked for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 10 seconds per skill.

name: Trauma
description: Headshots apply blind to the target for 3 seconds (cooldown: 30 seconds). Chest shots apply bleed to the target for 10 seconds (cooldown: 30 seconds).

name: Protected Reload
description: Reloading grants 20% bonus armor for 5 seconds. Allies within 10 meters also receive 0-18% bonus armor based on your defensive core attributes.

name: Vigilance
description: Increases total weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage removes this buff for 4 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Vigilance
perfectVersion.description: Increases total weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage removes this buff for 3 seconds.
perfectVersion.foundOn: The Gift (named backpack by Providence Defense)

name: Adrenaline Rush
description: When within 10 meters of an enemy, gain stacking bonus armor. Each stack grants 20% bonus armor, up to 3 stacks. Stacks are applied every 2 seconds while the condition is met.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Adrenaline Rush
perfectVersion.description: When within 10 meters of an enemy, gain stacking bonus armor. Each stack grants 23% bonus armor, up to 3 stacks.

name: Wicked
description: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 20 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Wicked
perfectVersion.description: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 23 seconds.

name: Opportunistic
description: Enemies hit with a shotgun or marksman rifle amplify damage from all sources to that enemy by 10% for 5 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Opportunistic
perfectVersion.description: Enemies hit with a shotgun or marksman rifle amplify damage from all sources by 15% for 5 seconds.

name: Combined Arms
description: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage and healing by 25% for 3 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Combined Arms
perfectVersion.description: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage and healing by 30% for 3 seconds.

name: Tech Support
description: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 20 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Tech Support
perfectVersion.description: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 27 seconds.

name: Composure
description: While in cover, increases total weapon damage by 15%.

name: Companion
description: When within 10 meters of an ally or a deployed skill, gain +15% weapon damage.

name: Bloodsucker
description: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +10% bonus armor for 10 seconds. Maximum 10 stacks.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Bloodsucker
perfectVersion.description: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +12% bonus armor for 10 seconds. Maximum 10 stacks.

name: Clutch
description: While your armor is below 15%, critical hits repair 2% of your max armor. Kills while below 15% armor fully repair your armor over 4-10 seconds based on offensive cores.

name: Calculated
description: Killing an enemy from cover reduces the cooldown of your skills by 10-15% based on skill tier.

name: Creeping Death
description: Applying a status effect to an enemy spreads it to all enemies within 5 meters. Cooldown: 15 seconds.

name: Energize
description: Using an armor kit increases your skill tier by 1 for 20 seconds, or triggers Skill Overcharge if already at tier 6. Cooldown: 60 seconds.

name: Leadership
description: Performing a cover-to-cover movement grants 15% of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies within 30 meters. The bonus is tripled if you end within 10 meters of an enemy.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Leadership
perfectVersion.description: Performing cover-to-cover grants 20% of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies within 30 meters. The bonus is tripled if you end within 10 meters of an enemy.

name: Overclock
description: Deploying a skill increases reload speed by 15% and reduces skill cooldowns by 15% for all allies within 10 meters for 15 seconds.

name: Protector
description: When your shield takes damage, grant 15% of your shield's max armor as bonus armor to all allies within 10 meters. Cooldown: 3 seconds.

name: Safeguard
description: While at full armor, skill repair and healing to you is doubled.

name: Shock and Awe
description: Applying a status effect to an enemy increases total skill damage and repair by 20% for 20 seconds.

name: Unstoppable Force
description: Kills grant +5% total weapon damage for 15 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.

name: Versatile
description: Swapping weapons grants +35% weapon damage at close range to the weapon you swap to, scaling down to +10% at maximum range. Duration: 5 seconds.

name: Concussion
description: Headshots grant +15% weapon damage for 10 seconds. Marksman rifle or rifle kills reset the duration.

name: Galvanize
description: Applying blind, ensnare, or confused to an enemy grants 40% bonus armor to you and allies within 10 meters.
